notes: Patient presented with acute stomach pain and mild dehydration. Fluid therapy initiated.

name: Aditi Rao
notes: ECG confirms palpitations. Under telemetry monitoring.

name: Arjun Kapoor
notes: MRI scheduled to confirm ACL tear. Knee brace applied.

name: Diya Malhotra
notes: Recovered from fever. Recommended plenty of fluids and bed rest.

name: Ishaan Iyer
notes: Stress-related headache. Advised lifestyle changes and mild analgesics.

name: Kavya Nair
notes: Allergic rash. Prescribed topical corticosteroids.

name: Rahul Bose
notes: Admitted for post-chemo supportive care and hydration.

name: Priya Patel
notes: Septic shock, broad-spectrum IV antibiotics initiated, on vasopressor support.

name: Rohan Deshmukh
notes: Wrist splint applied, orthopedics consult requested for casting.

name: Ananya Sen
notes: Chest X-Ray completed. No active infiltrates seen. Discharged with syrup.

name: Devendra Singh
notes: Scheduled for coronary angiography in the morning. Nitrates started.

name: Meera Joshi
notes: Thyroid profile checked, increased Levothyroxine dosage.

name: Siddharth Mehta
notes: Dose adjustment of Levetiracetam. EEG scheduled.

name: Sania Mirza
notes: Tennis elbow diagnosis. Cortisone injection administered.

name: Varun Dhawan
notes: Started on IV hydration and antibiotic therapy.

notes: Initiated Isotretinoin therapy. Set follow-up tests in 4 weeks.

notes: PET scan scheduled for staging and assessment.

name: Rhea Kapoor
notes: Stable post blood transfusion. Hemoglobin levels checked hourly.

notes: CT scan normal. Admitted for overnight observation.
